---
title: "Foundation Directory Online Professional"
page-layout: article
---

# Foundation Directory Online Professional

## Description

Database of U.S. foundations, grantmakers, corporate giving programs, public charities, grants, and IRS filings. Supports philanthropy, nonprofit, and funding research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb515)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
